title: BG11 medium
author: Roscoff Culture Collection

steps_raw.instruction: Under hood, to 1L of sterile water, add 20 mL of Cyanobacteria BG-11 Freshwater Solution from Sigma Filter the medium on 0,2 microns BG11 medium Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C3061-500ML
Recipe for standard BG-11 media by Anna Behle
